query:
INSERT INTO git_sync_ci_test_check
            (workspace_id, github_workspace_id, head_sha, repo_url, check_run_id,
             created_at, concluded, conclusion, concluded_at, github_posted)
         VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, now(), false, NULL, NULL, false)
         ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, head_sha) DO UPDATE SET
            github_workspace_id = EXCLUDED.github_workspace_id,
            repo_url = EXCLUDED.repo_url,
            check_run_id = EXCLUDED.check_run_id,
            created_at = now(),
            concluded = false,
            conclusion = NULL,
            concluded_at = NULL,
            github_posted = false
